description: Print information about nodes. If < range > is not supplied, information for all nodes is provided.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 7.0 contents command index.

keywords.name: segments
keywords.description: Print segment IDs for each node.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Print FISH extra information. A valid integer index i must be supplied.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: Print comprehensive node information. This includes: groups, extras, edge IDs, position.
